prompt: Audit this Python web-shop codebase (auth.py, api.py, payments.py, storage.py, crypto_utils.py) for security and correctness vulnerabilities. Cover every module. For each issue give the file:line and the concrete attack or impact.

defects.note: SQL injection via string concat in search_products
IDOR: get_order ignores current_user (+ SQLi via f-string)
refund has no amount validation (negative / over-refund)
